programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Motorcyclists film a bizarre, elongated humanoid creature walking along a road in Jharkhand, India; experts investigate the violent history behind an organized cult of professional robbers and murderers who targeted unsuspecting travelers.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Cameras capture an intense explosion in Ontario, Calif., that rips apart a suburban home and sends panicked onlookers running for their lives; experts investigate and suspect a potential detonation of an enormous cache of illegal fireworks.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: A villager captures a moment of horror as a mysterious series of explosions lights up a mountainside in India; experts investigate a possible link to lost plutonium during a Cold War spy mission that went disastrously wrong.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Motorcyclists film a bizarre, elongated humanoid creature walking along a road in Jharkhand, India; experts investigate the violent history behind an organized cult of professional robbers and murderers who targeted unsuspecting travelers.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Cameras capture an intense explosion in Ontario, Calif., that rips apart a suburban home and sends panicked onlookers running for their lives; experts investigate and suspect a potential detonation of an enormous cache of illegal fireworks.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: A villager captures a moment of horror as a mysterious series of explosions lights up a mountainside in India; experts investigate a possible link to lost plutonium during a Cold War spy mission that went disastrously wrong.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: A vacationing family films waves of fire breaking along the shores of an Indonesian island; experts investigate a possible connection to a classified WWII beach-burning weapon developed by the British to incinerate invading armies.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: A stone sphere, a hook and five fragments of wood are the only objects ever discovered inside the Great Pyramid of Giza; experts investigate if they can explain the mysteries behind the only surviving Wonder of the Ancient World.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Cameras capture stunned pedestrians running for cover as droplets of fire begin to rain down on the streets of St. Petersburg, Russia; experts investigate a network of nearby tram lines and the effect of a sudden lightning storm.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: A mysterious object is orbiting Saturn, and it looks just like the Death Star; new evidence might shed new light on the mysterious death of Yuri Gagarin, the first man in space; when a cutting-edge satellite vanishes, fears of a space war escalate.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Scientists wonder why Jupiter is hotter than it should be; the Curiosity Rover finds something strange on Mars; detectives turn to NASA for help with a murder cold case.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: A photograph depicts two suns in the sky over Indonesia; ghostly white swirls on the moon's surface baffle NASA scientists; an astronaut disappears during his return to Earth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Determining the age of the universe continues to be an elusive endeavor for scientists as their results are conflicting, and without a definitive answer, everything that's known about the cosmos could be completely wrong.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: In a fictional scenario set in 2029, an asteroid hurtling towards Earth at 40,000 mph will reduce New York to ashes; examining the hypothetical, experts weigh in to determine what could happen, and how it might be stopped.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Savage Builds
programme.desc: Adam wants to build his own version of King Arthur's legendary sword: Excalibur; using the iron found in a meteorite, he attempts to make an indestructible weapon.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Savage Builds
programme.desc: Adam Savage and a demolition expert team up to test one of the most dangerous and explosive substances on the planet, and cutting-edge science and tech will reveal if nitroglycerine really deserves its notorious reputation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Savage Builds
programme.desc: Adam Savage and a NASA engineer team up to build a rocket-propelled experimental super-weapon that could have changed the course of World War II; using cutting-edge tech, they try to make this notorious engineering failure an explosive success.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Savage Builds
programme.desc: Adam Savage teams up with TV personality Tory Belleci ("MythBusters") to stage the world's most epic food fight; using the latest science and technology, they build a rapid-fire weapon that turns hot dogs into projectiles.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Savage Builds
programme.desc: Adam Savage and inventors build a deadly fleet of junkyard vehicles that look straight out of "Mad Max," and using scrapyard materials and wicked-smart engineering, they face off to see whose motorized monster packs the most vicious punch.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Savage Builds
programme.desc: Richard Browning, the inventor and chief test pilot of the Gravity Jet Suit, which is powered by five 1,000-horsepower mini jet engines, helps get Adam's titanium Marvel Studios' Iron Man-inspired suit to fly.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Savage Builds
programme.desc: Adam Savage teams up with Oscar-winning actor Gary Oldman to build one of Hollywood's deadliest weapons, the ZF1 Multi-Artillery Gun from "The Fifth Element," a weapon so lethal that it features both a rocket launcher and a flamethrower.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: When water unleashes its rage upon the planet, it becomes the ultimate bringer of death; whether it's from rain washing over the ground, rivers bursting their banks, or failed efforts to stem the flow, flooding is as inevitable as it is unstoppable.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: Volcanoes created more than 80% of our planet's surface, but explosive eruptions can be deadly; a journey under the earth to discover why volcanoes are so dangerous.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: Hurricanes, typhoons and cyclones are all the same thing with different names, but what they also have in common is their destructive power.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: Tornadoes are violent, rotating columns of air that can level buildings, their unpredictability makes them even more destructive; a look at how tornadoes form and if they can be stopped.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: As technology advances, manmade accidents have become as destructive as some natural disasters; a look at recent catastrophes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Abandoned: Uncovering Fukushima
programme.desc: In 2011, a catastrophic nuclear disaster forced the immediate evacuation of Fukushima, Japan; a team of scientists uses hundreds of cameras to track and investigate the astonishing wildlife that now thrives in this deadly, radioactive environment.

programme.desc: Tornadoes are violent, rotating columns of air that can level buildings, their unpredictability makes them even more destructive; a look at how tornadoes form and if they can be stopped.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: The discovery of geysers on a moon; NASA's mission to detect life; an object is spotted approaching an asteroid.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: A Mars mission captures an image of a strange structure on the planet; an intriguing sight on the dark side of the moon; a planet-eating star gives scientists a peek of Earth's bleak future.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Cosmonauts are trapped in a capsule in a frozen lake; a NASA scientist investigates the Hindenburg; the full moon affects experiments.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Earth's history is marked by one cosmic disaster after another, forging the path of human evolution; now, experts explore how the Earth has teetered on the verge of destruction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: As the two Voyager spacecraft reach interstellar space, experts explore their astonishing discoveries and how their extended operation has transformed into the ultimate mission.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Cosmic rays capable of destroying human DNA are hurtling through outer space like subatomic bullets, causing space crews radiation damage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programme.sub-title: Bermuda Triangle: Hunt for the Cotopaxi
programme.desc: The disappearance of the SS Cotopaxi help launch the legend of the Bermuda Triangle; a team of experts follow fresh leads with cutting-edge tech to investigate if a mysterious wreck off the coast of Florida is indeed the long-lost ship.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programme.desc: When a sister ship of the Titanic gets embroiled in war with a hidden enemy, the former luxury liner is sent to the bottom of the ocean; new discoveries and cutting-edge underwater technology might finally reveal the secret history of its sinking.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programme.desc: New evidence in the Bermuda Triangle could reveal that Nazis got closer to America than ever believed; using the latest cutting-edge underwater technology, experts investigate the truth behind the shipwreck that shouldn't exist.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the treasures of a ghost fleet of Japanese ships at the bottom of the South Pacific, and using cutting-edge underwater technology, experts investigate a top-secret superweapon that could have changed the course of World War II.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programme.desc: A cutting edge investigation into an deep-sea graveyard of 25 shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history, and using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long lost battleships.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programme.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: A once lavish destination in the mountains of Romania is now in disrepair and mysteriously deserted; experts investigate these sprawling ruins and uncover the remains of a luxurious resort caught in a web of corruption.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: The bizarre remnants of a housing complex lie mysteriously deserted in an Ohio industrial town; experts investigate and uncover the dark, turbulent past of an oppressive steel company and labor strikes that resulted in deadly riots.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: An enormous war machine lies stranded in a coastal grave along the beaches of Dagestan, Russia; experts investigate and uncover the ruins of an experimental Soviet vehicle designed to strike fear in Western governments during the Cold War.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: A looming skyscraper that was once an exclusive residential complex turns into a dystopian ruin in Johannesburg, South Africa; experts investigate and uncover a symbolic structure of urban decay under the shameful shadow of apartheid.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: The ruins of a coastal fortress sit atop a jagged outcrop along the beaches of Wales; experts investigate and uncover a derelict 19th-century British fortification that housed a series of occupants, including an exotic, private zoo.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: A majestic estate for the rich and powerful now lies abandoned in the highlands of Argentina; experts investigate and uncover a once struggling hotel that was transformed into a luxurious resort outpost for elite Nazi German sympathizers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
